title: The Expedition against the Banu al -Mu^laliq
description: According to In Iiumayd-Salamah b. al-Fadl and 'Ali b. Mujahid217-Muhammad b. Ishaq-'ASim b. 'Umar b. Qatadah, 'Abdallah b. Abi Bakr, and Muhammad b. Yahya b. l jabban. [Ibn Ishaq] said, "Each transmitted to me part of the report on the Band al-Mustaliq." They said: Word reached the Messenger of God that the Band al-Mustaliq were gathering against him under the leadership of al-Harith b. Abi Dirar. (Al-Harith was the father of Juwayriyah bt.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 08
